\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5268 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\lambda\_i(t) \= \lambda\_0 \sum\_n J\_n(\kappa)^2 S\_{i,n}(t) \[1+\beta R\_i(t)\].$$
